narrativeProgression.summary: Metadata drift appears between duplicate files and erodes confidence.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: A telemetry packet arrives in Telegram with tomorrow's timestamp and your exact opening message.

threadUpdates.update: Dormant Array Wake: A telemetry packet arrives in Telegram with tomorrow's timestamp and your exact opening message.
Peripheral signal tied to Starfield deviation map remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Signal From Kharon-9 - Day 02 handwritten note
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Starfield deviation map.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Signal From Kharon-9 ARG artifact Day 02. Type: handwritten_note. Clue focus: Starfield deviation map. Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Signal From Kharon-9 handwritten_note audio cue for day 2. Clue anchor: Starfield deviation map. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Starfield deviation map and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_01.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Starfield deviation map.

puzzle.title: Day 02 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Starfield deviation map.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with STAR.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
